query:
INSERT INTO knox_documents (title, platform, ecu_family, doc_type, file_path, file_size_bytes, year_range, description) VALUES
('2025 Cummins ECU Complete Analysis', 'Cummins', '2025_PCM_000C', 'analysis', '/home/ubuntu/cummins_2025_efd_analysis.txt', 4500, '2025', 'Comprehensive analysis of 2025 Cummins ECU: RSA/SHA256 code signing, physical memory map, EFD EBML format, PKI infrastructure, three-generation BIN comparison'),
('2025 Cummins EFD - 05190374ag (TCM RWD)', 'Cummins', '2025_ZF_8AP', 'efd', '/home/ubuntu/upload/05190374ag.efd', 3510189, '2025', 'EFD for 2025 RAM 6.7L TCM RWD, ZF 8AP1075, NAS-50 STATE, Program 25HD_6.7_8AP1075'),
('2025 Cummins EFD - 05190375ag (TCM 4WD)', 'Cummins', '2025_ZF_8AP', 'efd', '/home/ubuntu/upload/05190375ag.efd', 3510185, '2025', 'EFD for 2025 RAM 6.7L TCM 4WD, ZF 8AP1075, NAS-50 STATE'),
('2025 Cummins EFD - 62430530ad (ECM)', 'Cummins', '2025_PCM_000C', 'efd', '/home/ubuntu/upload/62430530ad.efd', 7288087, '2025', 'EFD for 2025 RAM 6.7L ECM, created by Roger via EB2-Production v1.03.0027'),
('2025 Cummins EFD - 62430531ad (ECM)', 'Cummins', '2025_PCM_000C', 'efd', '/home/ubuntu/upload/62430531ad.efd', 7288065, '2025', 'EFD for 2025 RAM 6.7L ECM, created by Roger via EB2-Production v1.03.0027'),

('Three-Generation Cummins BIN Comparison', 'Cummins', 'CM2350', 'analysis', '/home/ubuntu/cummins_3gen_comparison.txt', 5000, '2014-2022', 'Comparison of 2014 (4MB) vs 2019 (8MB dual-bank) vs 2022 (8MB locked) BIN formats'),
('RAM 1500 EcoDiesel WinOLS A2L', 'Dodge', 'VM_Motori_3.0L', 'ols', '/home/ubuntu/upload/DodgeRam1500EcoDieselfromA2L.ols', 0, '2014-2017', 'WinOLS A2L definition for RAM 1500 3.0L EcoDiesel VM Motori diesel'),
('WinOLS EDC17C69 Map Readdressing Example', 'Bosch', 'EDC17C69', 'ols', '/home/ubuntu/upload/WinOLS(edc17c69(Exampleofmapmoved)-060159).ols', 0, 'N/A', 'Example of map being moved/readdressed in WinOLS EDC17C69 - technique reference for editor'),
('FCA Calibration Report August 2025', 'Dodge', 'FCA', 'calibration_report', '/home/ubuntu/upload/FCACalibrationReportAugust82025.pdf', 0, '2025', 'FCA calibration report with latest calibration data'),
('Cummins 6.7L High Pressure Fuel Injection Pump ID Differences', 'Cummins', 'CM2350', 'reference', '/home/ubuntu/upload/6.7LCumminsEngineHighPressureFuelInjectionPumpIdentificationDifferences.pdf', 0, '2013-2025', 'Fuel pump identification differences for auto-matching tunes to hardware'),
('Cummins HPT Logging Channels XML', 'Cummins', 'CM2350', 'pid_definition', '/home/ubuntu/upload/Cummins.Channels_CMF.xml', 0, '2013-2025', 'HPT channel definitions for Cummins datalogging - PID addresses and scaling'),
('Advanced Engine Performance Troubleshooting', 'Universal', 'N/A', 'training', '/home/ubuntu/upload/AdvancedEnginePerformanceTroubleshootingTechniques.pdf', 0, 'N/A', 'Advanced engine performance troubleshooting techniques training material'),
('ECU Remapping Course', 'Universal', 'N/A', 'training', '/home/ubuntu/upload/Re-mappingcourse.pdf', 0, 'N/A', 'ECU remapping course training material for Knox'),
('2019 RAM D2 Stock BIN', 'Cummins', 'CM2350', 'binary', '/home/ubuntu/upload/STOCK_2019D2DJRnoTasymv10024_52370931AM.bin', 8462336, '2019-2021', 'Stock 2019 RAM D2 BIN - 8MB dual-bank format, part 52370931AM'),
('2022 RAM D2 Stock BIN', 'Cummins', 'CM2350', 'binary', '/home/ubuntu/upload/STOCK_2022D2DJRnoTnoPMv10024_52370231AK_2500.bin', 8462336, '2022-2024', 'Stock 2022 RAM D2 BIN - 8MB locked format, part 52370231AK');
